description: Command dice face distributions for the Action Dice Allocation system. Inspired by War of the Ring action dice.

imperial.notes: Heavy military bias. No Wild face (rigid command structure). Gains dice from deploying leader NPCs.

operative.notes: Balanced with Wild face for flexibility. Fewer dice but more adaptable. Gains dice from recruiting companions.

faceDescriptions.Assault: Activate a figure to perform an Attack action
faceDescriptions.Maneuver: Activate a figure to Move, Take Cover, or reposition
faceDescriptions.Muster: Spend reinforcement points to deploy NPC units
faceDescriptions.Scheme: Play a tactic card for its strategic (non-combat) effect
faceDescriptions.Command: Activate a leader figure for any action type
faceDescriptions.Wild: Can be used as any face (Operative advantage)
